title: Portable Crafting Table
description: This mod adds a Portable Crafting Table(a item) for crafting without the need to place anything
body:
This mod adds a Portable Crafting Table(a item) for crafting without the need to place anything.

To use it just hold it in your hand and right click.

The mod is compatible with: [Just Enough Items (JEI)](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei)

The mod is compatible with: [Crafting Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/crafting-tweaks)

![recipe](https://i.imgur.com/Grd3Rct.png)

![partner](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/112d23b8-9986-4823-80de-d312484cf8c8.webp)

Feel free to use this mod on your modpack
